claim: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness already blocks PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function converts missing/clarify/block into blocker codes
Missing evidence items trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing array has items
Clarify/block recommendations and blocked/failed verdicts trigger EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED
Blockers from evidenceResultBlockingIssues are pushed into blockerList
evidence.why: Integration of blocking issues into final blocker array

evidence.summary: Test case confirms missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness with expected blocker codes
evidence.why: Executable test validation of blocking behavior

evidence.summary: Cross-checker with missing array triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker in test
evidence.why: Test evidence for missing data blocking

evidence.summary: Clarify recommendation triggers EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker in test
evidence.why: Test evidence for clarify recommendation blocking

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready equals false and both blocker codes exist when missing/clarify are present
evidence.why: Test evidence that blockers prevent prd_ready

risks: If claim is wrong, the evidence validation gate could pass with missing/clarify/block unresolved, allowing PRD generation without required evidence

result.notes: Independent verification confirms the explorer claim. The blocking logic in src/demand/router.ts correctly converts missing evidence items and clarify/block recommendations into blockers that prevent prd_ready from being true. The test in __tests__/demand-router.test.ts:313-353 validates this behavior works as intended. The demand requirement is already fully implemented and functional.
